panels.description:
All instances among pgsql cluster ${cluster}

Instance: Goto PGSQL Instance

IP: Goto PGSQL Node

Status: Goto PGSQL Service

Load: max(cpu,postgres,pgbouncer)

Space: Disk space usage max(all device)

Proxy: session number, Goto Haproxy Admin Page

Blue = PostgreSQL

Green = Pgbouncer

Yellow = Agent (Patroni / PG Exporters)
Ping RT
Instances among this cluster and their saturation (postgres or pgbouncer)

max(node:instance:cpu_usage, pg:instance:load, pgbouncer:instance:load)

panels.description:
Database of this cluster ${cluster}

Load: active_time / backends (PG14 only)

Query RT : max query rt of this database

Client: Pgbouncer Active Clients

Server: Pgbouncer Active Servers

Backend: Postgres num backends

D = Disabled in Pgbouncer ?

P = Paused in Pgbouncer ?

Service map tells whether a server can be used as a specific service/role/svc.
e.g Offline marks this server can be used as offline server
